name: vocab-conqueror
description: Vocab Conqueror - Military-themed vocabulary learning game

scripts.native:prepare: npm run native:web-assets && npm run native:audio-assets && npm run store:assets
scripts.native:sync: npm run native:prepare && npx cap sync
scripts.build:ios: npm run native:web-assets && npx cap add ios && npm run native:audio-assets && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.build:android: npm run native:web-assets && npx cap add android && npm run native:audio-assets && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
